notes: Dremel wounds: early transient activation then rapid attenuation; airbrush: prolonged elevation. Source: manuscript draft 2026-02-16.
Pink cellular aggregations emerge earlier and resolve faster in dremel wounds. Source: manuscript draft 2026-02-16.
Accelerated polyp regeneration under dremel; 100% polyp coverage by D14 dremel vs ~D63 airbrush. Source: manuscript draft 2026-02-16.

All treatment × time p > 0.23 after Bayesian adjustment for separation. Qualitative: all dremel fully closed by D28 and through D63; airbrush unhealed through D35; ~80% by D63 (15-21 day lag). Source: manuscript draft 2026-02-16.
All treatment × time p > 0.054 after Bayesian adjustment. Qualitative: 100% coenosarc coverage by D14 dremel vs D63 airbrush (~49 day acceleration). Source: manuscript draft 2026-02-16.
Time-dependent increase in algal plug formation. Source: manuscript draft 2026-02-16.
Time-dependent decrease (plateau). No treatment × time interaction (all p > 0.088). Source: manuscript draft 2026-02-16.
Time-dependent increase in yellow aggregations. Source: manuscript draft 2026-02-16.
Time-dependent decrease. No treatment × time interaction (all p > 0.076). Source: manuscript draft 2026-02-16.
Individual polyps regenerate by day 10 regardless of position (apex vs base). Polyp regeneration occurs ~7 days after coenosarc coverage. Source: manuscript draft 2026-02-16.
